title: Board
description: A powerful Bukkit/Spigot plugin for creating customizable, persistent leaderboards with rich formatting options.
body:
# Board Plugin

A Bukkit/Spigot plugin for creating customizable, persistent leaderboards with rich formatting and hologram support.

## Features
- Configurable leaderboards via `config.yml`
- PlaceholderAPI integration
- Holographic displays using HologramLib
- Persistent storage with SQLite
- Rich text formatting and visual customization

## Commands
- `/board spawn <leaderboard>`
- `/board remove <leaderboard>`
- `/board update`
- `/board help`

## Dependencies
- Spigot / Bukkit 1.19+
- PlaceholderAPI
- HologramLib

## Installation
1. Download the latest release
2. Place `Board.jar` in the `plugins/` directory
3. Install required dependencies
4. Restart the server
5. Configure `config.yml`

## Configuration
Leaderboards are fully configurable, including:
- Titles, placeholders, and prefixes
- Text formatting and gradients
- Player head display options
- Sorting and display layout settings
- For advanced config go to https://github.com/LadonON/Board

For full configuration options, examples, API usage, and source code, see:  
**https://github.com/LadonON/Board**
